title: Nested reels
abstract: Gaming systems and methods that provide a game with nested reels including an outer reel and an inner reel where the inner reel is initially nested in (and thus hidden in) the outer reel and then moveable out of the outer reel during a play of the game.
claims: 1. A gaming system comprising: a processor; and a memory device that stores a plurality of instructions, that when executed by the processor, cause the processor to: cause a display, by a display device, of nested reels comprising an initially displayed outer reel and an initially hidden inner reel that is not initially displayed, the outer reel comprising a first plurality of different symbols, the inner reel comprising a second plurality of different symbols; cause a display, by the display device, of the outer reel spinning and stopping; cause a display, by the display device, of an indication of an expansion condition; cause a display, by the display device, of the inner reel expanding out of a first side of the outer reel to a fully displayed inner reel position; cause a display, by the display device, of the outer reel re-spinning and stopping; cause a display, by the display device, of the inner reel spinning and stopping; cause a display, by the display device, of an indication of one of the symbols of the outer reel; and cause a display, by the display device, of an indication of one of the symbols of the inner reel.
